description: LoopTrain Standalone 试玩版结构化内容物料包。

trial_scope.goal: 证明第七节车厢存在异常，并说服赵乘警检查地板。

standalone_notes: ST import formats have been removed from the local default workflow.
Standalone runtime should read canonical LoopTrain content formats.
LLM prompts are content inputs; the Engine remains the only state judge.
